title: hierochloe horsfieldii
intro: Hierochloe horsfieldii, also known as sweet grass or holy grass, is a perennial grass native to Asia that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hierochloe horsfieldii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
